extracted_json.title: TIM 172A — SPSP Steps 4–5, HW #1, and TA Structure

blocks.text: Please do not use "Canvas Notifications" to contact us

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: SPSP steps 4–5, HW #1 note, and TA structure for TIM 172A.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Notes covering the final steps of the SPSP method (Step 4: check your work/reflect; Step 5: learn & generalize about cell-phones and yourself as a problem-solver), a note that HW #1 Prob 2 is a simpler version of Prob 1, and the TA structure for TIM 172A split into Infrastructure (Canvas) handled by Vihan and Customer & Grader facing handled by Fariha. Reminder: do not use Canvas Notifications to contact the staff.

transcription:
